narrative:
Rome Twp township has 1,308 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a clear Republican lean of 11.7 percentage points.
